course_title: HUMAN ANATOMY FOR PHYSICAL AND OCCUPATIONAL THERAPY STUDENTS
description: Dissection-based gross human anatomy relevant with a physical and occupational therapy focus. Special emphasis is placed on the musculoskeletal and peripheral nervous systems, and living subject and surface anatomy.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Doctor of Physical Therapy Program or Occupational Therapy OTD Program

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Doctor of Physical Therapy Program or Occupational Therapy OTD Program
